So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |location= {{ill|Nishi-ku, Sakai|ja|西区 (堺市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai, Osaka|ja|堺市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Sakai|ja|西区 (堺市)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (attributed to {{ill|Emperor Richū|ja|履中天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft}}). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft}} fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]]

Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Sakai|ja|西区 (堺市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Sakai|qq=}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai|qq=}}, Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Mozu Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥古墳群|1=Mozu Tombs|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu Kofun Group|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu Tombs|qq=}}, Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to {{ill|Emperor Richū|ja|履中天皇|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Richū|qq=}}). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include {{ill|fukiishi|ja|葺石|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/fukiishi|qq=}} and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|13=User:Immanuelle/Sue pottery|qq=}} fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]]

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:堺市西区の歴史]] [[Category:大阪府にある国指定の史跡]]

revision.comment: Bot: replace redirect category → National historic sites in Osaka prefecture
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:堺市西区の歴史]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府の古墳]] [[Category:百舌鳥古墳群]]

Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai�]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:大阪府の古墳]] [[Category:百舌鳥古墳群]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai�]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture�]] [[Category:百舌鳥古墳群]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[:en:1926|1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1961|1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[:en:1926|1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1961|1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[:en:2000|2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[:en:2008|2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

"Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[:en:1926|1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1961|1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[:en:2000|2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[:en:2008|2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[:en:2010|2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[:en:2014|2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[:en:2017|2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[:en:1926|1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1961|1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[:en:2000|2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[:en:2008|2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[:en:2010|2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[:en:2014|2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[:en:2017|2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[:en:2019|2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}

This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name= Terayama Minamiyama Kofun |image= |alternate_name= | part_of= [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]] |location= [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai, Osaka]], Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= {{coord|34|33|21.70|N|135|28|48.25|E}} |type= {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |size= 44.7 m × 39.2 m
Height 4.7 m |burial= Unknown |burial goods= [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]], [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] |satellite_tombs= |built= Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]] |buried_person= |imperial_tomb= |Historic Site1= National Historic Site (part of Mozu Kofun Group) |Historic Site2= UNESCO World Historic Site (part of {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}) |Historic Site3= |notable_features= |map= Japan Osaka |type= Square Kofun |map_dot_label= Terayama Minamiyama
Kofun |map_dot_label= top }} '''Terayama Minamiyama Kofun''' (寺山南山古墳) is a {{ill|square kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in [[:en:Nishi-ku, Sakai|Nishi-ku, Sakai]], [[:en:Sakai|Sakai]], Osaka Prefecture. It is part of the [[:en:Mozu Tombs|Mozu Tombs]], Historic Site1 as a National Historic Site and inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site (within the {{ill|Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|ja|百舌鳥・古市古墳群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group|qq=}}). == Overview == [[File:寺山南山古墳 家形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|House-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] [[File:寺山南山古墳 囲形埴輪.JPG|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Enclosure-shaped Haniwa}}{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}}]] The kofun is located northeast of the outer moat of the {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} (attributed to [[:en:Emperor Richū|Emperor Richū]]). While the mound has been modified by residential development, excavations and ground-penetrating radar surveys have been conducted since 1999. The mound is rectangular, measuring 44.7 meters by 39.2 meters with a height of 4.7 meters, and is constructed in two tiers. Features include [[:en:Fukiishi|fukiishi]] and a cylindrical haniwa row. Some of the oldest known [[:en:Sue pottery|Sue pottery]] fragments were recovered from the site. A protrusion on the southeast side of the mound, measuring 9.9 meters by 3.4 meters, revealed house-shaped and enclosure-shaped haniwa alongside haniwa rows. Surrounding the mound is a moat, 6–8.5 meters wide, partially shared with the Misanzai Kofun. The burial facility and grave goods remain unidentified, but the kofun is dated to the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]. It is one of the few square kofun in the Mozu Kofun Group and is considered closely associated with the Misanzai Kofun, likely serving as a satellite tomb. The kofun was Historic Site1 as part of the "Mozu Kofun Group" National Historic Site in 2014. 寺山南山古墳 円筒埴輪・朝顔形埴輪・須恵器片.JPG|Cylindrical Haniwa, morning glory-shaped haniwa, and Sue pottery fragments
{{small|Displayed at Sakai City Museum.}} == Excavation History == * [[:en:1926|1926]] (Taishō 15): Survey map reporting the kofun as square {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1961|1961]] (Shōwa 36): Residential development on the mound {{Sfn|堺の文化財 百舌鳥古墳群|2014}}. * [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11): Excavations conducted by Sakai City Board of Education. * [[:en:2000|2000]] (Heisei 12): Excavations at TYM-2 site (reported in 2002). * [[:en:2008|2008]] (Heisei 20): Excavations at TYM-3 site (reported in 2010). * [[:en:2010|2010]] (Heisei 22): Ground-penetrating radar survey and excavations at TYM-4 site (reported in 2012). * [[:en:2014|2014]] (Heisei 26): Included in the Mozu Kofun Group National Historic Site {{Sfn|国cultural property等データベース|2014}}. * [[:en:2017|2017]] (Heisei 29): Excavations at TYM-5 site (reported in 2018). * [[:en:2019|2019]] (Reiwa 1): Inscribed as a UNESCO World Historic Site site as part of the Mozu-Furuichi Kofun Group. == Related Facilities == * '''Sakai City Museum''' (Sakai-ku, Mozu Akatsukiyama-cho): Displays burial goods from Terayama Minamiyama Kofun. == References == {{reflist}} == Bibliography == * Sakai City. "Historic Site of Sakai: Mozu Kofun Group," 2014. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|ja|上石津ミサンザイ古墳|1=Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamizuka Misanzai Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami-Ishizu Misanzai Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * {{National Historic Site Database|401|1797|Mozu Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.sakai.lg.jp/kanko/rekishi/bunkazai/bunkazai/shokai/bunya/shiseki/mozukofungun/terayamaminamiyama.html Terayama Minamiyama Kofun] - Sakai City Website {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|寺山南山古墳|version=102006677|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National Historic Sites of Japan in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]][[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]]}} [[sn:Terayama Minamiyama Kofun]] [[ja:寺山南山古墳]] [[Category:History of Nishi-ku, Sakai]] [[Category:National historic sites in Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Mozu Kofun Group]] {{Commons category|Terayama Minamiyama Kofun}}
